steps.title: Set up the total area equation
steps.content:
The region contains 88 square lots, each of area $R$ square units, so the total area is $88R$.

The length is 5.5 times the width. If the width is $W$, then length is $5.5W$.

Using the rectangle area formula:
$$\text{Area} = \text{length} \times \text{width} = 5.5W \times W = 5.5W^2 = 88R$$

steps.title: Substitute the given width expression
steps.content:
The problem tells us $W = X\sqrt{R}$. Substitute into the area equation:
$$5.5(X\sqrt{R})^2 = 88R$$
Simplify the squared term:
$$5.5 \cdot X^2 \cdot R = 88R$$

steps.title: Isolate and solve for X
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $R$:
$$5.5X^2 = 88$$
Divide both sides by 5.5:
$$X^2 = \frac{88}{5.5} = 16$$
Take the positive square root (since $X$ scales a length):
$$X = 4$$
